form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. McConnell submitted the following resolution; which was considered and agreed to

form.official-title: Making minority party appointments for the 110th Congress.

section.text: That the following be the minority membership on the following committees for the remainder of the 110th Congress, or until their successors are appointed:

committee-appointment-paragraph.header: Committee on Energy and Natural Resources:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Mr. Domenici, Mr. Craig, Ms. Murkowski, Mr. Burr, Mr. DeMint, Mr. Corker, Mr. Barrasso, Mr. Sessions, Mr. Smith, Mr. Bunning, and Mr. Martinez.

committee-appointment-paragraph.header: Committee on Environment and Public Works:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Mr. Inhofe, Mr. Warner, Mr. Voinovich, Mr. Isakson, Mr. Vitter, Mr. Barrasso, Mr. Craig, Mr. Alexander, and Mr. Bond.
Mr. Grassley, Mr. Hatch, Mr. Lott, Ms. Snowe, Mr. Kyl, Mr. Smith, Mr. Bunning, Mr. Crapo, Mr. Roberts, and Mr. Ensign.
Ms. Murkowski, Mr. McCain, Mr. Coburn, Mr. Barrasso, Mr. Domenici, Mr. Smith, and Mr. Burr.
